V0416_01_00_00_0.text:
I'm Nash of Barian World!
The one who's taking you down!

V0416_01_00_01_0.text: You'll be less than a footnote in Barian World's history!

V0416_01_00_02_0.text:
Only one of us can survive.
And I prefer it to be me!

V0416_01_00_03_0.text: You'll beg for mercy once I unleash the true power of chaos!

V0416_01_00_04_0.text:
I'll do anything for Barian World!
Even abandon my friends!

V0416_01_00_05_0.text: When I defeat you, that will prove I'm truly a Barian!

V0416_01_00_06_0.text:
Yuma! Astral!
It's time we face our fate!

V0416_01_00_07_0.text: When I chose to be a Barian, that's when Shark was no more!

V0416_01_00_08_0.text:
Are you done reminiscing about the past?
When I was Shark?

V0416_01_00_08_1.text:
Those days are gone!
I'm now Nash of Barian World!

V0416_01_00_09_0.text:
Me and you...
We now live in different worlds, Quattro.

V0416_01_00_10_0.text: I've never met anyone I wanted to destroy more than you!

V0416_01_00_10_1.text: I'll give you a Duel you'll never forget, Vector!

V0416_01_00_11_0.text: With this Duel, I will prove to you that I am a Barian!

V0416_01_00_12_0.text: I'll leave my past behind and live as a Barian!

V0416_03_00_00_0.text: Put your cards away becuz you won't be getting another turn!

V0416_03_00_01_0.text: I will wipe you from existence!

V0416_03_00_04_0.text:
You're pretty good.
Finally a Duelist worth defeating!

V0416_03_00_05_0.text:
You think you have the upper hand?
Enjoy it while it lasts!

V0416_05_00_00_0.text: The fate of the whole Duel rests on the next card...

V0416_06_01_01_0.text: I won't let you do that!

V0416_06_01_02_0.text: You sure you made the right move?

V0416_07_09_00_0.text: I flip over the card I Set!

V0416_08_00_00_0.text: I activate my Spell Card, Aqua Jet!

V0416_08_00_01_0.text:
I activate my Spell!
Xyz Gift!

V0416_08_00_02_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Overlay Regen!

V0416_08_00_03_0.text: I activate the Quick-Play Spell, Mystical Space Typhoon!

V0416_08_00_04_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Salvage!

V0416_08_00_05_0.text: The Continuous Spell, Different Dimension Deepsea Trench!

V0416_08_00_06_0.text: Different Dimension Deepsea Trench's effect activates!

V0416_08_00_07_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Falling Current!

V0416_08_00_08_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Monster Reborn!

V0416_08_00_09_0.text: I activate the Continuous Spell, Sea Lord's Amulet!

V0416_08_00_10_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Surface!

V0416_08_00_11_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Secret Retaliation!

V0416_08_00_12_1.text: I activate my Spell Card, Chain Summon!

V0416_08_00_13_0.text: I put out the bait, and you chomped right into it!

V0416_08_00_13_1.text: The Trap Card, Xyz Dimension Splash!

V0416_08_00_14_0.text:
Heh!
I caught me a big one!

V0416_08_00_14_1.text: I activate the Trap, Splash Capture!

V0416_08_00_15_0.text: I activate the Continuous Trap, Bubble Bringer!

V0416_08_00_17_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Fish Rain!

V0416_08_00_18_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Icy Crevasse!

V0416_08_00_19_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Poseidon Wave!

V0416_08_00_20_0.text: I activate the Trap, Torrential Reborn!

V0416_08_00_21_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Torrential Tribute!

V0416_08_00_22_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Dimensional Prison!

V0416_08_00_23_0.text:
I activate my Counter Trap!
Seven Tools of the Bandit!

V0416_08_00_24_0.text: Since you activated a Trap, I can activate Explosive Urchin!

V0416_08_00_25_0.text: Explosive Urchin's effect deals you damage!

V0416_08_00_27_0.text: This will show the true power of the Barian Emperors!

V0416_08_00_28_0.text:
Here I go!
Barian's Chaos Draw!

V0416_08_00_29_0.text:
I activate my Field Spell!
Barian Untopia!

V0416_08_00_31_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Seventh Ascension!

V0416_08_00_32_0.text: I activate Seventh Ascension's effect from my Graveyard!

V0416_08_00_33_0.text: I activate the Quick-Play Spell, Seventh Force!

V0416_08_00_34_0.text:
I activate my Quick-Play Spell!
Rank-Up-Magic Quick Chaos!

V0416_08_00_35_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Seventh Tachyon!

V0416_08_00_36_0.text:
I activate my Equip Spell!
Reincarnation Unveiling Mail!

V0416_08_00_37_0.text: By equipping Unveiling Mail, my monster can use this effect!

V0416_08_00_38_0.text: Unveiling Mail activates when it goes to the Graveyard!

V0416_08_00_39_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Xyz Entrust!

V0416_08_00_40_0.text: I banish Xyz Entrust from my Graveyard to use its effect!

V0416_08_00_41_0.text:
I activate my Spell Card!
Aqua Jet Surface!

V0416_08_00_42_0.text: I banish Aqua Jet Surface from my Grave to use its effect!

V0416_08_00_43_0.text: I activate the Spell Card, Torpedo Takedown!

V0416_08_00_44_0.text: I activate Torpedo Takedown's effect from my Graveyard!

V0416_08_00_45_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Rebirth of the Seventh Emperors!

V0416_08_00_46_0.text: I activate the Trap, Reincarnation of the Seventh Emperors!

V0416_08_00_47_0.text: I activate the Continuous Trap, Seventh Eternity!

V0416_08_00_49_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Xyz Revive Splash!

V0416_08_00_50_0.text: I banish Xyz Revive Splash from my Grave to use its effect!

V0416_08_00_51_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Xyz Poseidon Splash!

V0416_08_00_52_0.text: I banish Xyz Poseidon Splash from my Graveyard!

V0416_08_00_53_0.text:
I activate my Trap!
Full-Armored Xyz!

V0416_08_00_54_0.text: I activate Full-Armored Xyz by banishing it from my Grave!

V0416_09_00_00_0.text: I use 1 Overlay Unit to activate Cat Shark's effect!

V0416_09_00_01_0.text: I use 1 Overlay Unit to activate Shark Fortress's effect!

V0416_09_00_01_1.text:
My chosen monster gains an extra attack!
Mayhem Missiles!

V0416_09_00_02_0.text: I use 1 Overlay Unit to activate Bahamut Shark's effect!

V0416_09_00_03_0.text: I use 1 Overlay Unit to activate Black Ray Lancer's effect!

V0416_09_00_04_0.text: Full Armored Black Ray Lancer destroys your Spell or Trap!

V0416_09_00_05_0.text: I use 1 Overlay Unit to activate Shark Caesar's effect!

V0416_09_00_06_0.text: I use 1 Overlay Unit to activate Aero Shark's effect!

V0416_09_00_07_0.text: I use 1 Overlay Unit to activate Leviathan Dragon's effect!

V0416_09_00_08_0.text: Embodiment of Punishment uses an Overlay Unit!

V0416_09_00_10_0.text: I use 1 Overlay Unit to activate Shark Drake Veiss's effect!

V0416_09_00_11_0.text: Hope Woven Dragon Spider Shark's effect activates!

V0416_09_00_12_0.text: Spider Shark's leaving you a parting gift!

V0416_09_00_14_0.text: Nightmare Shark uses an Overlay Unit to activate its effect!

V0416_09_00_16_0.text: I use 1 Overlay Unit to activate Crystalzero's effect!

V0416_09_00_17_0.text: I activate Full Armored Crystalzero Lancer's effect!

V0416_09_00_18_0.text: When Xyz Remora is Special Summoned, its effect activates!

V0416_09_00_19_0.text: If Megalodon deals battle damage, it can destroy a monster!

V0416_09_00_20_0.text: By Special Summoning Kaiser Sea Snake, its effect activates!

V0416_09_00_22_0.text: Friller Rabca's effect activates from my Graveyard!

V0416_09_00_23_0.text: Summoning a Fish, Sea Serpent or Aqua means I can play this!

V0416_09_00_24_0.text: When Shocktopus is destroyed, its effect activates!

V0416_09_00_25_0.text: When Skull Kraken is summoned, it destroys a face-up Spell!

V0416_09_00_26_0.text: Skull Kraken can change battle positions once per turn!

V0416_09_00_28_0.text: Spear Shark's effect activates when it's summoned!

V0416_09_00_30_0.text: When Double Fin Shark is summoned, its effect activates!

V0416_09_00_31_0.text: When Double Shark is summoned, I can activate its effect!

V0416_09_00_33_0.text: Depth Shark uses its effect to gain ATK this turn!

V0416_09_00_34_0.text: By reviving Tripod Fish, its effect activates!

V0416_09_00_35_0.text: When Drill Barnacle deals direct damage, it gains ATK!

V0416_09_00_36_0.text: When Needle Sunfish swims away, it lowers a monster's ATK!

V0416_09_00_38_0.text: When Big Jaws attacks, it's banished at the end of battle!

V0416_09_00_39_0.text: When Big Whale is Tribute Summoned, its effect activates!

V0416_09_00_40_0.text: When I summon Right Hand Shark, I can draw Left Hand Shark!

V0416_09_00_41_0.text: I Special Summon Right Hand Shark from my Graveyard!

V0416_09_00_43_0.text: When Right Hand Shark is on my field, I can summon this!

V0416_09_00_44_0.text: When it's revived from my Graveyard, its Level becomes 4!

V0416_09_00_45_0.text: Acid Golem is going to make me self-destruct...

V0416_09_00_46_0.text: Silent Honor ARK uses an Overlay Unit to power its effect!

V0416_09_00_47_0.text: Silent Honor DARK activates its effect!

V0416_09_00_48_0.text: Silent Honor DARK can revive if it has a Chaos Overlay Unit!

V0416_09_00_49_0.text: Silent Honor DARK can revive over and over!

V0416_09_00_51_1.text: Extinguish all their hopes and dreams!

V0416_09_00_52_0.text: I activate Number C103: Ragnafinity's effect!

V0416_09_00_53_0.text: When Ragnafinity is destroyed, its effect activates!

V0416_09_00_55_0.text: I activate Number C104: Umbral Horror Masquerade's effect!

V0416_09_00_56_0.text: Comet Cestus's effect activates when it destroys a monster!

V0416_09_00_57_0.text: I activate Battlin' Boxer Comet Cestus's effect!

V0416_09_00_58_0.text: I activate Number C106: Giant Red Hand's effect!

V0416_09_00_59_0.text: I activate Neo Galaxy-Eyes Tachyon Dragon's effect!

V0416_09_00_60_0.text: I Tribute 2 monsters to activate Neo Galaxy-Eyes's effect!

V0416_09_00_61_0.text: The Seven Emperors will fight as one!

V0416_09_00_62_0.text: I'll use Abyss Supra Splash's Chaos Overlay Unit!

V0416_09_00_63_0.text: I use Overlay Units to activate N.As.H. Knight's effect!

V0416_09_00_64_0.text: I use a Chaos Overlay Unit for N.As.Ch. Knight's effect!

V0416_09_00_65_0.text: I use an Overlay Unit to activate Valiant Shark Lancer!

V0416_09_00_66_0.text: Valiant Shark Lancer activates its effect!

V0416_09_00_67_0.text: I use an Overlay Unit to power Shark Drake LeVeiss's effect!

V0416_09_00_69_0.text: Rebarian Shark activates when it goes to the Graveyard!

V0416_09_00_70_0.text: Full Armored Dark Knight Lancer activates its effect!

V0416_09_00_71_0.text: Equipping a card activates Dark Knight Lancer's effect!

V0416_09_00_72_0.text:
Xyz Armor Fortress!
Use your Overlay Units!

V0416_09_00_73_0.text: Xyz Armor Torpedo activates by using its Overlay Units!

V0416_09_00_74_0.text: Full Armored Utopic Ray Lancer activates its effect!

V0416_09_00_75_0.text: I use an Overlay Unit to charge Utopic Ray Lancer's effect!

V0416_09_00_76_0.text: I banish Gazer Shark from the Graveyard to use its effect!

V0416_09_00_78_0.text: When Cutter Shark is Special Summoned, its effect activates!

V0416_09_00_79_0.text: I activate Dream Shark's effect from my hand!

V0416_09_00_80_0.text: Dream Shark's effect activates from the Graveyard!

V0416_09_00_81_0.text: I activate Abyss Shark's effect from my hand!

V0416_09_00_83_0.text: I activate Silent Wobby's effect from my hand!

V0416_09_00_83_1.text: I Special Summon this card to your field!

V0416_09_00_84_0.text: Now you draw one card, and I gain LP!

V0416_09_00_85_0.text: Surfacing Big Jaws activates its effect from my hand!

V0416_09_00_86_0.text: Surfacing Big Jaws activates its effect when it's Summoned!

V0416_09_00_87_0.text: Drake Shark's effect activates from my hand!

V0416_09_00_88_0.text: Using Drake Shark as material gives Shark Drake an effect!

V0416_09_00_89_0.text: When Veiss Shark is Summoned, it can activate its effect!

V0416_09_00_90_0.text: Using Veiss Shark as material gives Shark Drake an effect!

V0416_09_00_92_0.text: I activate Armored Shark's effect from the Graveyard!

V0416_09_00_93_0.text: Successfully Summoning Mermaid Shark activates its effect!

V0416_11_01_00_0.text: I Summon a monster in Defense Position!

V0416_13_00_00_0.text:
Cat Shark!
Come out and play!

V0416_13_00_03_0.text: Welcome to the Duel, Black Ray Lancer!

V0416_13_00_04_0.text:
Dress for battle!
Full Armored Black Ray Lancer!

V0416_13_00_05_0.text:
The king of the deep!
Shark Caesar!

V0416_13_00_06_0.text:
I unleash the terror of both air and sea!
Aero Shark!

V0416_13_00_08_0.text:
Let's go!
Number 31: Embodiment of Punishment!

V0416_13_00_11_0.text: Number 37: Hope Woven Dragon Spider Shark!

V0416_13_00_15_0.text: Gear up, Full Armored Crystalzero Lancer!

V0416_13_00_34_0.text: Rise from the deep, Depth Shark!

V0416_13_00_41_0.text:
Check out the largest monster in the seven seas!
Big Whale!

V0416_13_00_45_0.text: This super powerful Number has 3000 ATK!

V0416_13_00_52_0.text: Take to the field, Number C105!

V0416_13_00_55_0.text: Witness the power of the Seven Barian Emperors!

V0416_13_00_64_0.text:
Xyz Armor Torpedo!
Come on out!

V0416_16_00_00_0.text: Whatever hope you had is gone!

V0416_19_00_04_0.text: Full Armored Black Ray Lancer! Attack!

V0416_19_00_31_0.text: Time to attack, Double Fin Shark!

V0416_19_00_45_0.text: Dissolve them to a goop, Acid Golem!

V0416_19_00_48_0.text:
Let's do this, Dumon!
Archfiend Seraph! Attack!

V0416_19_00_49_0.text:
This is for you, Marin!
Ragnafinity! Attack!

V0416_19_00_50_0.text:
All right, Vector!
Attack, Umbral Horror Masquerade!

V0416_19_00_51_0.text:
Let's knock 'em out, Alito!
Comet Cestus! Attack!

V0416_19_00_52_0.text:
You and me, Girag!
Giant Red Hand! Smash 'em!

V0416_19_00_53_0.text:
Ready, Mizar!
Neo Galaxy-Eyes Tachyon Dragon! Attack!

V0416_19_00_58_0.text:
Shark Drake LeVeiss!
Attack for a second time!

V0416_19_00_60_0.text:
Full Armored Dark Knight Lancer!
Attack!

V0416_19_00_63_0.text:
Full Armored Utopic Ray Lancer!
Attack!

V0416_19_00_67_0.text:
Abyss Shark!
Teach 'em to stay out of the deep!

V0416_21_00_00_0.text: Heh. You're lucky to still be alive.

V0416_21_00_01_1.text: How does it feel to be crushed under my destructive might?

V0416_21_00_04_0.text: You're playing better than I expected.

V0416_21_00_05_0.text: This Duel is not over yet!

V0416_26_00_02_0.text: Is that the best you got?

V0416_27_00_02_0.text: I can't take much more of that...

V0416_28_00_00_0.text: The power of chaos is an unstoppable force of fury!

V0416_28_00_01_0.text: As the leader of the Barians, countless souls rely on me!

V0416_28_00_02_0.text: Never underestimate the champion of Barian World!

V0416_28_00_03_0.text: Stay down, if you know what is good for you!

V0416_28_00_04_0.text: I'll never again be the Shark you once knew!

V0416_28_00_05_0.text: I will fight for Barian World to the bitter end!

V0416_28_00_06_0.text: Winning was never in the cards for you, Quattro.

V0416_28_00_07_0.text:
Vector!
This is for all the pain and suffering you caused!

V0416_28_00_08_0.text:
You're finished, Don Thousand!
We're unstoppable!

V0416_28_00_09_0.text: It is time for us to work together to protect Barian World!

V0416_28_00_10_0.text: If you still doubt my loyalty to the Barians, challenge me!

V0416_28_00_11_0.text:
I won't question my decision anymore.
Thanks, Marin!

V0416_29_00_00_0.text: This can't be what destiny chose for me...

V0416_29_00_01_0.text: No matter what I did, I couldn't save anyone...

V0416_29_00_02_0.text: My dream was to lead Barian World to glory, but I failed.

V0416_29_00_03_0.text: I may have fallen, but I am far from defeated!

V0416_29_00_04_0.text: I guess my long journey has come to an end.

V0416_29_00_05_0.text: You won't go wrong as long as you believe in yourself.

V0416_29_00_06_0.text:
I lost...
But I never knew losing could feel so good.

V0416_29_00_07_0.text: Thanks for teaching me to feel the flow.

V0416_29_00_08_0.text:
You were great Duelists.
But even better friends.

V0416_29_00_09_0.text:
Tori...
Look after those clowns for me, will ya?

V0416_29_00_10_0.text: Can't you understand that I never want to feel human again?

V0416_29_00_11_0.text:
All I want to feel is rage!
Rage that destroys everything!

V0416_29_00_12_0.text:
Argh...
You really are the worst, Vector!

V0416_29_00_13_0.text: Only you can make a bad situation worse, Don Thousand!

V0416_29_00_14_0.text:
Doubt us if you want.
But Marin and I are Barians.

V0416_29_00_15_0.text:
Thanks, Marin.
I now know what I must do.

V0416_30_00_00_0.text: So much work to accomplish so little.

V0416_30_00_01_0.text: Do you think I'm so naive that I'll fall for your tricks?

V0416_30_00_02_0.text: I want to thank you for tossing me a lifeline.

V0416_32_00_01_0.text: Time to face my destiny in Yu-Gi-Oh! Duel Links!

V0416_33_00_00_0.text: Destiny has chosen me to fight this fight!

V0416_33_00_01_0.text: With the true power of the Barians, you have no chance!

V0416_33_00_02_0.text: No human can understand the true depths of chaos!

V0416_33_00_03_0.text:
I'm bringing the chaos!
Barian's Chaos Draw!

V0416_34_00_00_0.text: I tricked you into playing that card!

V0416_34_00_04_0.text:
You deluded fool!
I was never your friend!

V0416_34_00_05_0.text:
I feel nothing for you.
Except pity at how pathetic you are!

V0416_34_00_06_0.text: I know how to treat my fans too.

V0416_34_00_07_0.text:
Let your anger towards me grow.
Makes turning on you easier.

V0416_34_00_08_0.text: You're forcing me to do what must be done.

V0416_34_00_09_0.text:
This card proves that I'm a Barian!
A human no more!

V0416_34_00_10_0.text: We can't go back to how things used to be.

V0416_34_00_11_0.text:
You're not going to attack?
That's nice - but not smart.

V0416_34_00_12_0.text: What you just said is going to stick with me.

V0416_35_00_00_0.text:
“Shark...”
It feels like a long time since anybody called me by that name.

V0416_35_00_01_0.text:
I'm not Shark or Reginald anymore.
My name is Nash!

V0416_36_00_00_0.text:
Be careful.
They're certain to have tricks up their sleeve!

V0416_36_00_02_0.text: This is when we show what we can really do!

V0416_36_00_04_0.text: There is no one I trust more than you, Dumon!

V0416_36_00_09_0.text: I leave the fate of this Duel in your hands, Yuma!

V0416_36_00_11_0.text:
Yuma!
Do whatever it takes to survive!

V0416_37_00_00_0.text: I'll bring forth the most fearsome stronghold in the seas!

V0416_37_00_01_0.text: Let your roar create tidal waves in every ocean!

V0416_37_00_03_0.text: This denizen of the deep is thirsting for a feeding frenzy!

V0416_37_00_04_1.text: Swimming from the abyss is Number C32!

V0416_37_00_05_0.text: The land and the sea merge into a new life form!

V0416_37_00_06_0.text: Purify chaos with your sacred water!

V0416_37_00_07_0.text: Number 94 is here to freeze the world in ice!

V0416_37_00_09_1.text: Raise the souls of the disillusioned from the depths!

V0416_37_00_10_0.text:
Chaos Xyz Evolution!
Feast your eyes on Number C101!

V0416_37_00_10_1.text: The guardian of souls that shatters the light!

V0416_37_00_11_0.text: When you take on me, you take on all Seven Barian Emperors!

V0416_37_00_11_1.text: Together, we can Summon our most powerful monster!

V0416_37_00_12_0.text:
Chaos Xyz Evolution!
Go, Number C101!

V0416_37_00_13_0.text: Dive into the depths to rescue the souls of the forgotten!

V0416_37_00_14_1.text: The chaotic knight who saves the souls of the disillusioned!

V0416_37_00_15_1.text:
The jaws that devour the light!
Number C32!
